context: W3 RE-TEST of you (#1252 verdict FAIL_REGRESSION = MISDIAGNOSIS, confirmed via engine log by dev supervisor). you's block mechanism = url_query_blocked: PII must be submitted as a SEARCH/CHAT QUERY that you.com routes into a GET query string (engine detects '주민등록번호' in the query → block_session → sets domain block) → THEN the V6-F request-side page-replacement fires on the subsequent page load WITHIN the 5-min window.
